name: empty_history_falls_back_to_vol_which_returns_zero
description: Empty historical_data dict. len(valid_dates) = 0 < 15 -> fall back to calculate_20d_vol. Vol sees 0 < 20 -> returns 0.0. Guards against IndexError or NaN on empty input through both layers.
derivation: valid_dates = sorted([]) = [], length 0 < 15 -> ATR returns calculate_20d_vol(...). calculate_20d_vol sees length 0 < 20 -> returns 0.0.
